name: openclaw-security-auditor
description: Security audit tool for OpenClaw AI assistant — detects malicious skills, config vulnerabilities, CVEs, and prompt injection risks
author: OpenClaw Security Community

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');function cp(src,dst){if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(src,{withFileTypes:true})){const s=path.join(src,e.name),d=path.join(dst,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())cp(s,d);else if(!e.name.endsWith('.ts'))fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}}cp('tests/fixtures','dist/tests/fixtures')" && node scripts/prepare-dist-skill.js
scripts.build:release: npm run build && npm run release:assets
